title: Runs
subtitle: {group}'s upcoming schedule and monthly calendar at a glance.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Runs
upcoming.subtitle: A detailed view of what's coming up next for the group.
upcoming.empty: No upcoming runs are scheduled yet.

selected_day.title: Selected Day
selected_day.subtitle: Runs scheduled for {date}.
selected_day.empty: No runs are scheduled for this day.

calendar.title: Monthly Calendar
calendar.subtitle: A month view of the group's run schedule.

management.title: Run Management
management.subtitle: Manage the live details for this {type} run.
management.placeholder: This is the entry point for slot assignment, applications, and progress updates.
management.coming_soon: The full activity management interface comes next. This page is now the dedicated destination for roster assignment and activity administration.
management.summary_subtitle: A quick read on the basics before the full management tools land.
management.schedule_activity_confirm: Schedule this run? It will become visible on calendars, and users may be able to apply depending on the run settings.

schedule_activity_modal.title: Schedule Run
schedule_activity_modal.body: Scheduling this run makes it part of the group's live schedule. It can appear on calendars and, depending on the run's access and application settings, users may be able to find it and apply.

management.cancel_activity_confirm: Cancel this run? This archives it, disables further edits, and stops new applications.

cancel_activity_modal.title: ARE YOU SURE
cancel_activity_modal.body: Cancelling this run archives it immediately. Moderators will no longer be able to edit it, and applicants will no longer be able to apply.

messages.prepare_move_failed: Unable to prepare this roster move.
messages.load_slot_assignment_failed: Unable to load slot assignment details.
messages.load_manual_assignment_failed: Unable to load group member assignment options.
messages.return_to_queue_failed: Unable to return this slot to the queue.
messages.undo_check_in_failed: Unable to undo check-in for this slot.
messages.check_in_failed: Unable to check in this slot.
messages.mark_late_failed: Unable to mark this slot as late.
messages.check_in_group_failed: Unable to check in this group.
messages.mark_missing_failed: Unable to mark this slot as missing.
messages.undo_missing_failed: Unable to undo this missing slot.
messages.assign_failed: Unable to assign this application to the selected slot.
messages.manual_assign_failed: Unable to assign this group member to the selected slot.

manual_assignment.title: Manual Assignment
manual_assignment.select_character_warning: Choose a group member character to continue.
manual_assignment.incompatible_fields: The selected character does not have compatible options for the slot fields on this slot.
manual_assignment.editing_assignment_body: This slot was manually assigned, so you can update its slot field values here. Returning it to the queue stays disabled.

complete_activity_modal.title: Complete Run
complete_activity_modal.description: Record the final run outcome before this run is archived.
complete_activity_modal.warning_body: Once completed, this run becomes archival-only. Moderators will no longer be able to edit the roster, applications, or activity details.

warning_points.immutable: The run will be locked and treated as archival/overview-only.
warning_points.overview_only: Moderators will no longer be able to edit or delete the activity after completion.
warning_points.progress: The final stored progression result becomes the source of truth for this run.

complete_activity_modal.no_milestones: This activity type has no progress milestones configured, so this completion will only archive the run.
complete_activity_modal.method_help: Choose whether to paste an FF Logs report for autofill or enter the normalized result manually.
complete_activity_modal.fflogs_link_placeholder: Paste the FF Logs report or fight link
complete_activity_modal.fflogs_step_help: Paste the FF Logs report link for this run. The next step will process it and prefill the progression result for review.
complete_activity_modal.fflogs_step_hint: You want the report or fight link that contains the run you are completing, not just the character rankings page.
complete_activity_modal.fflogs_preview_error: Unable to process this FF Logs report right now.
complete_activity_modal.furthest_progress_placeholder: Select the actual furthest point reached
complete_activity_modal.milestones_hint: Enter the normalized final result that should be stored for this run.
complete_activity_modal.milestones_autofilled_hint: Review the autofilled result and adjust anything that needs correction.
complete_activity_modal.manual_step_help: Enter the final normalized progression result for this run.
complete_activity_modal.notes_placeholder: Optional notes about the result or evidence.
complete_activity_modal.confirm_body: Double check this progression result before completing the activity.

methods.fflogs_help: Paste a report link and let the system autofill the milestone progression.
methods.manual_help: Enter the final progression result directly from the run outcome.

progression.title: Recorded Progression
progression.subtitle: The final progression result stored for this completed run.

roster.title: Roster Assignments
roster.subtitle: Parties and slots are generated from the activity layout and ready to be filled.
roster.filled_placeholder: Assigned character details and controls will live here next.
roster.empty: No roster slots were generated for this activity.

queue.title: Applicant Queue
queue.decline_footer_hint: Declining removes this application from the pending queue and cannot be undone.
queue.decline_success_description: The application was declined and removed from the queue.
queue.decline_error_description: This application could not be declined right now.
queue.placeholder: Applicant details, playable jobs, and notes will be expanded here next.

decline_modal.title: Decline Application
decline_modal.description: Remove this application from the pending review queue.
decline_modal.warning_description: Once an application is declined, moderators cannot return it to pending review from the dashboard.
decline_modal.reason_description: If you add a reason here, the applicant will be able to see it on their application page.
decline_modal.reason_placeholder: Share any context the applicant should know.

modal.fflogs_not_configured: This activity type does not have an FF Logs zone configured.
modal.fflogs_empty: No FF Logs progress was found for this character in the configured zone.
modal.fflogs_error: FF Logs progress could not be loaded right now.
modal.fflogs_unavailable_guest: FF Logs progress is only available once this application is linked to a verified FullParty character.
modal.no_user_stats: No previous roster history was found for this user.
modal.no_user_stats_guest: Roster history is not available for guest applications.

overview.title: Run Overview
overview.subtitle: {group} shared this {type} run.
overview.description: This is the attendee-facing overview for the run and its application flow.
overview.summary_subtitle: The key details before the application tools land here.
overview.applications_ready: Application submission will live from this page. For now, this direct link is the right access path.
overview.applications_login: You will need to log in before applying once the application flow is added here.

application.title: Application
application.subtitle: Apply to join {group}'s {type} run.
application.run_info_subtitle: A quick reminder of the run details while you apply.
application.summary_schema_hint: This run type's question schema will be rendered here next.

form.title: Application Form
form.subtitle: Share the details moderators need so they can review your application.
form.character_description: Applicants will be able to choose which of their characters they want to apply with.
form.guest_mode_title: Get more with a FullParty account
form.guest_mode_description: You can still apply as a guest, but signing in lets you keep your linked characters, update applications more easily, and build your run history across groups.
form.guest_name_description: Enter your character name exactly as it appears on Lodestone.
form.guest_world_description: Choose the world your character belongs to before searching.
form.guest_search_missing_fields: Enter both a character name and home world before searching.
form.guest_search_failed: We could not search Lodestone right now. Please try again in a moment.
form.guest_search_invalid: Please check the search details and try again.
form.guest_results_description: Select the character that matches your application.
form.guest_no_results_description: Double check the spelling and world, then try the search again.
form.answers_description: The form will render {count} activity-type question fields here.
form.notes_description: A freeform notes area will live here for any extra context the applicant wants to share.
form.notes_placeholder: Anything else the moderators should know?
form.login_required_description: You need to log in before you can submit an application.
form.no_characters_description: Add or verify a character on your account before applying.
form.locked_description: This application is no longer editable because it is no longer pending review.

confirmation.submitted_description: Your application for {group}'s {type} run is in and ready for moderator review.
confirmation.updated_description: Your latest changes are saved and ready for moderator review.
confirmation.status_description: Here is the current status of your application for {group}'s {type} run.
confirmation.run_info_subtitle: Here is the final summary of what you sent.
confirmation.guest_cta_title: Make a FullParty account for the full experience
confirmation.guest_cta_description: Create an account if you want proper notifications, run history, and easier access when signing up for future runs.
confirmation.guest_link_description: Copy this link if you want to come back later to check your application or edit it while it is still pending review.
confirmation.copy_link_success_description: You can save or share this link to revisit your guest application later.
confirmation.copy_link_error_description: Please copy the address from your browser and keep it somewhere safe.
confirmation.review_reason_description: The moderation team left this note on your application.
confirmation.answers_description: This is the information you sent to the moderators.
confirmation.notes_description: Your extra notes are included below.

create.title: Create Run
create.subtitle: Set up a new run for your group.
create.placeholder: The dedicated activity creation flow will live here.
create.no_types_description: Create and publish an activity type from the admin area before creating activities for groups.

form.title: Activity Setup
form.subtitle: Pick the activity type, basic schedule details, and who is organizing it.

basics.title: Basics
basics.subtitle: Choose the activity, organizer, and the main setup details.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Set the start time in FF14 Server Time and how long the activity will run.

access.title: Access
access.subtitle: Decide who can see the activity and how people join it.

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Add any extra context for the roster, applicants, or attendees.

title.label: Custom Title
title.placeholder: Optional custom title for this activity

notes.label: Notes
notes.placeholder: Optional notes for the roster and applicants

starts_at.label: Starts At
starts_at.server_time_hint: All activity times are entered in FF14 Server Time (UTC+0).

is_public.label: Public Activity
is_public.help: Public activities are visible based on the group's visibility rules.

needs_application.label: Needs Application
needs_application.help: Turn this on if members should apply instead of assigning themselves.

allow_guest_applications.label: Allow Guest Applications
allow_guest_applications.help: Let people apply without a FullParty account.

summary.title: Draft Summary
summary.subtitle: A quick preview of what this activity currently looks like.
summary.guest_applications_not_applicable: Not used when applications are off
summary.help: This is just the scaffold for now. Next we can shape the exact create flow, defaults, and previews however you want.

edit.title: Edit Run
edit.subtitle: Update the run details moderators are allowed to change.

form.title: Edit Run
form.subtitle: Update the mutable details for this run without changing its core structure.

basics.subtitle: Adjust the organizer, title, status, and target prog point.

access.subtitle: Update whether this run should accept guest applicants.
